description: One program uses `empty` and `member` in BOTH roles: as ordinary variables (`:empty`, `:member`) and as the predicate keyword immediately after `is` (`is empty`, `is member of`). The reader picks the role by grammatical position (spec/grammar.md:230,365), so the whole program parses with no diagnostic. Parse-only (default), demonstrating the Layer-1 reader's positional disambiguation.
